message:
feat(meta): wire RRefAccessOracle into mutation testing harness (bd-2km50)

Add CrossRegionRRefAccess mutation that validates the oracle correctly
detects cross-region RRef access violations. Baseline shows clean
same-region access; mutation injects a cross-region access that the
oracle catches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
